name: Chocolate Midnight Madness
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl with mixer on medium speed, beat cream cheese and mayonnaise until smooth.
2. Gradually beat in sugar. Beat in eggs one at a time.
3. Mix in melted chocolate and vanilla until smooth.
4. Pour into prepared pie crust on a cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes or until set. Chill for 4 hours.
